nasb.text: But 600 men turned and fled toward the wilderness to the rock of Rimmon, and they remained at the rock of Rimmon four months.

esv.text: But 600 men turned and fled toward the wilderness to the rock of Rimmon and remained at the rock of Rimmon four months.

cnv.text: 剩下的六百人轉身，向著曠野逃跑，到了臨門的磐石那裡，就在臨門的磐石那裡住了四個月。

ccb.text: 只有六百人逃到了临门岩，在那里住了四个月。
